DP.271.0002:
Rowan: ...
...\f
[0103,0000], that was MESPRIT,
wasn’t it?\f
You’ve accomplished what I’d asked
you to do at the Canalave Library...\f
I asked you to get data on the
Pokémon of the lake, and you did.\f
But it didn’t provide any answers
about the mysteries of evolution.\f
I still don’t know why some Pokémon
evolve and others don’t.\f
Ultimately, it only deepened the
mystery.\f
But having mysteries to solve...
That adds to my enjoyment!\f
DP.271.0003:
[0103,0000], why don’t you chase
after MESPRIT?\f
To me, it seemed as if it wanted to
play with you.\f
If you were to use the Pokétch app
Marking Map, you’d be able to\r
track the movements of Pokémon.\f
DP.271.0004:
What?
You don’t have the Marking Map?\f
...You should occasionally pay visits
to the Pokétch Company, you know.\f
DP.271.0005:
Go on, [0103,0000].\f
I’m sure that you will keep meeting
countless Pokémon and people.\f
Those encounters will keep thrilling
you in their own special ways.\f
I hope you’ll enjoy that experience!
Take care, [0103,0000].\f
